---
name: Bug report
about: Create a report to help us improve
title: BUG REPORT
labels: bug
assignees: ''

---

**Describe the bug**
A clear and concise description of what the bug is.

[e.g. the app malfunction in some operation]
**To Reproduce**
Steps to reproduce the behavior:

[e.g. 1.do this operation,2.do this,3 the bug reproduce]

**Expected behavior**
A clear and concise description of what you expected to happen.
[e.g. "the script is not generate properly.","the app cant run","the app crash/trow an error when doing this operation"]

**Screenshots**
If applicable, add screenshots to help explain your problem.

**Desktop (please complete the following information):**
 - OS: [e.g. windows 7]
 - Version [e.g. WINOSREL_1.0.0_26022]

**Additional context**
Add any other context about the problem here.
